hero.headline: When *everything* breaks at once
hero.subheadline: We show up on Sundays. We fix arcade machines. We handle disaster cleanup. No job too weird, too small, or too urgent for Tallahassee.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: We repair what others won't touch
services_section.subheading: From vintage arcade machines to storm damage cleanup — if it's broken in your house, we'll figure it out

services.title: Appliance Resurrection
services.description: Dryers, washers, ovens, refrigerators — we bring dead appliances back to life and keep them running strong

services.title: Emergency House Repairs
services.description: Water damage, break-ins, storm aftermath — we help put your home back together when disaster strikes

services.title: Specialty Electronics
services.description: Arcade machines, vintage equipment, unusual electronics — we research and restore what others give up on

services.title: Kitchen & Bath Fixes
services.description: Leaky sinks, broken oven glass, cabinet repairs — all the little things that make your kitchen unusable

services.title: Complete Home Maintenance
services.description: Regular upkeep, seasonal repairs, preventive fixes — keeping everything working before it breaks

about.heading: The handyman team Tallahassee calls first
about.body: We're the ones who show up when other repair services won't. Sunday service calls, disaster cleanup, vintage electronics — nothing's too unusual or too urgent. We've been solving impossible repair problems for Tallahassee homeowners who need someone reliable enough to trust with their worst days and weird enough to fix a PAC-MAN machine.

reviews.name: Fred
reviews.text: They came out on Sunday to fix my dryer and had it running like new in under an hour. Professional service at great rates.

reviews.name: Pat L.
reviews.text: Best repair service ever! Prompt, friendly, professional. They've fixed everything for me over the years — washer, dryer, oven, kitchen sink leaks.

reviews.name: Tracy M.
reviews.text: Fantastic service! They researched my old PAC-MAN machine and brought it back to life. Fair price and wonderful to have it working again.

reviews.name: Edward H.
reviews.text: After returning from rehab to a house damaged by break-in and weather, they helped make it livable again when I thought it was hopeless.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Tallahassee and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout Leon County and beyond

cta.heading: Ready to fix whatever's broken?
cta.body: Don't let broken appliances, storm damage, or mystery malfunctions ruin your day. We'll figure it out and get it working right.
